creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Chris,
Thanks and sorry it took so long before any update on this PR.  The unbreak was resolved in https://svnweb.FreeBSD.org/ports?view=revision&revision=380889.  Are you still interested in taking maintainership of this port?  I can set you as the maintainer and add you as another mirror along side the Github mirror.
